item.title: GRCE Stock On Track For Worst Week In 5.5 Years — What’s Driving The Selloff?
item.description: Earlier this week, the FDA refused to approve Grace Therapeutics’s experimental drug for the treatment of a severe form of acute brain injury.

item.title: CAR Stock Heads For Biggest Weekly Fall In Over 15 Years – Retail Expects Further Sell-Off After Q1 Earnings Next Week
item.description: Avis Budget Group’s shares are set to test the 50-day moving average for the first time in a month after the sharp three-session sell-off.

item.title: Google Reportedly Set To Invest Up To $40B In Anthropic – Here’s The Breakup
item.description: Google is committing to invest $10 billion in Anthropic at a $350 billion valuation.

item.title: ApeCoin Skyrockets To 3-Month High – Crypto Whale Nets $700,000 Profit After Going Long
item.description: ApeCoin’s price recovered after hitting a record low of $0.08 last week but remains down by 68% over the past 12 months.

item.title: CMPS On Track For Best Week Ever On FDA Push For Psychedelics
item.description: Compass said on Friday that the FDA has granted its synthetic psilocybin formulation the Commissioner's National Priority Voucher for treatment-resist...
